chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 837 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.891/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.892/2023. 30.04.2026 Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2023 without any progress. On 03.04.2023, following order was passed: “03.04.2023 Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, for applicant. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Counsel seeks time to reframe questions of law arising out of the impugned judgment of the Tribunal. Let the needful be done. Adjourned.” Today needful has not been done and counsel merely seeks time. No cogent reason is made out to perpetuate clogging the docket even after three years. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
